cases.prompt: The requested launch checklist is busywork and the stated goal is fewer failed releases. What should we prove first?
We keep repeating the same fix but the outage returns. Help choose a better starting point and proof threshold.
My request includes an exact method, but I am not sure whether the method is binding or only one possible route.
Separate what these focused tests prove from whether the whole release is complete.
Rename CustomerID to customer_id and return only the new header.
Translate Good morning into French and return only the translation.
What command shows the current Git branch?
Fix the typo in this sentence and change nothing else.
Copy notes.md to notes-edited.md and preserve the original.
Copy notes.md, but first decide whether editing it can prove the stated incident outcome.
